EN
Sign in

Execution of an OTC grain transaction
A controlled deal — from terms to settlement
One deal record connects participants, transport, acceptance, quality, documents, payment grounds and disputes. Every stage shows the owner, next action and reason for any block.
PUBLIC MODE
Below is an anonymised example of the live execution process. Real deals, organisations and payments are not exposed in public mode.
See how a deal is executed
Connect an org
